basic_details.job_title: SIDBI Consultant Credit Analyst Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 50 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI)
basic_details.short_information: SIDBI Recruitment 2026 notification (Advertisement No. 03/2026-27) has been released on July 20, 2026 for the engagement of Consultant Credit Analyst (CCA) on a contractual, full-time basis. The Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI) is inviting applications for 50 vacancies for qualified Chartered Accountants through the ICAI Placement Directorate process. This article covers the complete SIDBI CCA notification details, including vacancy breakup, eligibility, age limit, salary, selection process, and how to apply.

qualification.details: The candidate should not be more than 28 years old as on June 30, 2026. | The candidate must be a Qualified Chartered Accountant. The candidate should have cleared the CA Final examination in not more than two attempts. This criterion may be relaxed for candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD categories, if required. | Nil. The notification does not require prior work experience for this post.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be offered a remuneration of ₹12.00 lakh per annum on a Cost to Company (CTC) basis, inclusive of fixed and variable components. Additional facilities such as Group Insurance will also be provided. An annual increment on the initially fixed CTC will be considered based on periodic performance review. The salary includes a variable component of 10%, released subject to satisfactory performance as decided by the Bank.

selection_process: Selection is done through shortlisting and personal interview at Mumbai
and Ahmedabad. SIDBI may conduct an online Psychometric Test or any other suitable test to assess personality

and suitability for the post. Results of the Psychometric Test may be placed before the interview panel for a thorough perspective on candidates. The Bank reserves the right to modify the selection procedure if deemed fit. Merit List: Prepared in descending order based solely on interview scores. Wait List: SIDBI may draw a wait list to meet actual requirements
if needed. In case of a tie in interview scores
candidates will be ranked by age in descending order (older candidate ranked higher)
both in the select list and wait list.
how_to_apply: Selection for this post is carried out through the process organized by ICAI (ICAI Placement Directorate) for Newly Qualified Chartered Accountants.
Interested candidates must visit the official ICAI Placements website for indicative guidelines and the registration procedure.
Out of the locations listed by ICAI, SIDBI will conduct interviews tentatively at Mumbai, New Delhi, Chennai, and Ahmedabad centers.
Applications sent directly to SIDBI will not be entertained under any circumstances.
important_instructions: The candidate must be a citizen of India. The number of vacancies mentioned is provisional and may vary. The post/designation name is indicative; SIDBI reserves the right to change it without prior notice. Appointment is subject to the candidate being declared medically fit by the Bank's Medical Officer, along with satisfactory character, background, and referee verification. If it is found at any stage that a candidate does not meet eligibility criteria, or has furnished incorrect information, suppressed material facts, or resorted to impersonation, the candidature will be cancelled - even after appointment, if discovered later. Candidates are liable for civil/criminal consequences if information submitted is found false at a later stage. Decisions of the Bank on eligibility, shortlisting, interviews, and selection are final and binding. No correspondence will be entertained in this regard. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification of candidature. It may not be possible to employ PwBD candidates in all offices/departments; they will need to work at posts/centers as decided by the Bank.

rows.details: Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI)
Through ICAI Placement Directorate (not directly to SIDBI)

content_sections.heading: SIDBI CCA Important Dates 2026
content_sections.text: Note: The selection process for this post is conducted by the ICAI Placement Directorate for Newly Qualified Chartered Accountants. Candidates should check the ICAI Placements portal for the exact registration schedule, as the official SIDBI notification does not list a separate application portal timeline of its own.

content_sections.heading: SIDBI CCA Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: The ST vacancy figure of 6 includes 3 backlog vacancies. PwBD vacancies are horizontal and already included within the vacancies of the respective parent category. In case suitable candidates are not found for the 2 PwBD backlog vacancies, they will be filled from other PwBD sub-categories, if found suitable. PwBD is defined as per "The Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016."

tables.caption: PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disabilities) Vacancy Breakup

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for SIDBI Consultant Credit Analyst
content_sections.text: The candidate should not be more than 28 years old as on June 30, 2026. The candidate must be a Qualified Chartered Accountant. The candidate should have cleared the CA Final examination in not more than two attempts. This criterion may be relaxed for candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD categories, if required. Nil. The notification does not require prior work experience for this post.

content_sections.heading: SIDBI CCA Salary and Remuneration 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be offered a remuneration of ₹12.00 lakh per annum on a Cost to Company (CTC) basis, inclusive of fixed and variable components. Additional facilities such as Group Insurance will also be provided. An annual increment on the initially fixed CTC will be considered based on periodic performance review. The salary includes a variable component of 10%, released subject to satisfactory performance as decided by the Bank.

content_sections.heading: Place of Posting
content_sections.text: Selected candidates shall be posted with Head Office Verticals at Mumbai, Delhi, and Lucknow, and at various Branch Offices of SIDBI, mainly in Tamil Nadu, Gujarat, Rajasthan, and nearby states. SIDBI reserves the right to post or transfer contractual staff to any of its offices, or depute them to any associate/subsidiary or other organization as per service requirements.

content_sections.heading: Period of Contract
content_sections.text: The initial contract term for CCA is 3 years, subject to an interim review. The contract may be extended, at the Bank's sole discretion, for a further period of up to 2 years. The contract can be terminated by either side with 3 months' notice, or salary/allowances in lieu thereof.

content_sections.heading: Roles and Responsibilities of CCA
content_sections.text: The role of the Consultant Credit Analyst (illustrative, not exhaustive) includes: Business development, appraisal of MSME credit proposals, sanctions, disbursements, customer management, credit monitoring, and follow-up (at Branch Offices/Regional Offices). Timely completion of review/renewal of proposals and accounts. Representing SIDBI on various forums and as a member of credit committees. Operational work at SIDBI Verticals (for candidates posted at Head Office), such as Risk Management, Institutional Finance, Venture Finance & Investment, Direct Credit, NBFC, Digital Initiatives, Strategy and Innovations, and Audit Verticals. Any other work assigned by the Bank from time to time.

content_sections.heading: SIDBI CCA Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection is done through shortlisting and personal interview at Mumbai, New Delhi, Chennai, and Ahmedabad. SIDBI may conduct an online Psychometric Test or any other suitable test to assess personality, communication level, problem-solving ability, efficiency, and suitability for the post. Results of the Psychometric Test may be placed before the interview panel for a thorough perspective on candidates. The Bank reserves the right to modify the selection procedure if deemed fit. Merit List: Prepared in descending order based solely on interview scores. Wait List: SIDBI may draw a wait list to meet actual requirements, if needed. In case of a tie in interview scores, candidates will be ranked by age in descending order (older candidate ranked higher), both in the select list and wait list.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Not specified in detail in the official notification. The notification only mentions that eligible candidates from reserved categories must produce a certificate issued by a competent authority as per Government of India guidelines, wherever reservation/relaxation is claimed. Specific document checklists for the interview stage are not listed in this notification; candidates should refer to instructions on the ICAI Placements portal for further details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for SIDBI CCA Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Selection for this post is carried out through the process organized by ICAI (ICAI Placement Directorate) for Newly Qualified Chartered Accountants. Interested candidates must visit the official ICAI Placements website for indicative guidelines and the registration procedure. Out of the locations listed by ICAI, SIDBI will conduct interviews tentatively at Mumbai, New Delhi, Chennai, and Ahmedabad centers. Applications sent directly to SIDBI will not be entertained under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The candidate must be a citizen of India. The number of vacancies mentioned is provisional and may vary. The post/designation name is indicative; SIDBI reserves the right to change it without prior notice. Appointment is subject to the candidate being declared medically fit by the Bank's Medical Officer, along with satisfactory character, background, and referee verification. If it is found at any stage that a candidate does not meet eligibility criteria, or has furnished incorrect information, suppressed material facts, or resorted to impersonation, the candidature will be cancelled - even after appointment, if discovered later. Candidates are liable for civil/criminal consequences if information submitted is found false at a later stage. Decisions of the Bank on eligibility, shortlisting, interviews, and selection are final and binding. No correspondence will be entertained in this regard. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification of candidature. It may not be possible to employ PwBD candidates in all offices/departments; they will need to work at posts/centers as decided by the Bank.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in SIDBI CCA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: SIDBI has announced 50 vacancies for the post of Consultant Credit Analyst (CCA) under Advertisement No. 03/2026-27.

faq.question: Q2. What is the age limit for SIDBI CCA post?
faq.answer: Candidates should not be more than 28 years old as on June 30, 2026, with age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for SIDBI CCA?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Qualified Chartered Accountant who cleared the CA Final exam in not more than two attempts. This may be relaxed for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD candidates if required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for SIDBI Consultant Credit Analyst?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will get ₹12.00 lakh per annum (CTC), including fixed and variable components, plus facilities like Group Insurance, with a 10% variable pay component and annual increment based on performance.

faq.question: Q5. Is work experience required for SIDBI CCA recruitment?
faq.answer: No. The notification specifies "Nil" experience requirement for this post.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for SIDBI CCA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications are not accepted directly by SIDBI. Candidates must apply through the ICAI Placement Directorate process for Newly Qualified Chartered Accountants, via the official ICAI Placements portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the SIDBI CCA application fee?
faq.answer: Not specified in the official notification.
